nasb.text: Being found in appearance as a man, He humbled Himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.

esv.text: And being found in human form, he humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.

cnv.text: 既然有人的樣子，就自甘卑微，順服至死，而且死在十字架上。

ccb.text: 祂以人的样子出现后， 就自愿卑微，顺服至死， 而且死在十字架上。

csbs.text: 降卑自己，顺从至死， 甚至死在十字架上！
